title: Marketa Lazarová
writer: Frantisek Pavlícek, Vladislav Vancura, Frantisek Vlácil
actors: Josef Kemr, Magda Vásáryová, Nada Hejna
plot: A grim portrayal of the shift from Paganism to Christianity in medieval central Europe - as a young virgin promised to God is kidnapped and raped by a marauder who her religious father seeks to kill in return.
